steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for PETRORECÔNCAVO S.A. 2025-03-31
from math import isfinite
# Given values (latest = 2025-03-31)
Ativo = 7454930000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 1573777000.0
Caixa = 315621000.0
Aplicacoes = 702215000.0
ContasReceber = 355003000.0
Estoques = 19734000.0
TributosRec = 100087000.0
OutrosAC = 81117000.0
Ativo_Nao_Circulante = 5881153000.0
Imobilizado = 5573251000.0
Intangivel = 76148000.0

Passivo_Circulante = 636063000.0
Fornecedores = 367947000.0
Emprestimos_cur = 67824000.0
OutrasObr = 32652000.0
Provisoes_cur = 171000.0

Passivo_Nao_Circulante = 2355077000.0
Emprestimos_ncur = 1788205000.0
OutrasObr_ncur = 375425000.0
Provisoes_ncur = 191447000.0

Patrimonio_Liq = 4463790000.0

# Income statement: quarterly (Q1 2025) and Q1 2024 and annual 2024
# Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO 2025-01-01 to 2025-03-31)
rev_q125 = 860752000.0
cogs_q125 = -540866000.0
gross_q125 = 319886000.0
oper_q125 = -60121000.0
ebit_q125 = 259765000.0
fin_q125 = 48997000.0
pre_tax_q125 = 308762000.0
tax_q125 = -81233000.0
net_q125 = 227529000.0

# Q1 2024 (PENULTIMO quarter provided)
rev_q124 = 744735000.0
cogs_q124 = -475848000.0
gross_q124 = 268887000.0
oper_q124 = -69397000.0
ebit_q124 = 199490000.0
fin_q124 = -70978000.0
pre_tax_q124 = 128512000.0
tax_q124 = -18479000.0
net_q124 = 110033000.0

# Annual 2024 (ÚLTIMO in previous annual table)
rev_2024 = 3264554000.0
ebit_2024 = 948220000.0
net_2024 = 437498000.0
gross_2024 = 1191749000.0
dep_2024 = -694816000.0
# Depreciation Q1 values (negative in table)
dep_q125 = -164082000.0
dep_q124 = -153862000.0

# Trailing twelve months (TTM) ending 2025-03-31 = annual2024 + Q1_2025 - Q1_2024
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q125 - rev_q124
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q125 - ebit_q124
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q125 - net_q124
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q125 - gross_q124
# Depreciation TTM (absolute expense)
dep_ttm = dep_2024 + dep_q125 - dep_q124
# dep values negative (expenses) -> dep_ttm negative; take magnitude
dep_ttm_mag = -dep_ttm

# EBITDA TTM = EBIT_TTM + depreciation magnitude
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + dep_ttm_mag

# Debt
div_bruta = Emprestimos_cur = Emprestimos_cur = Emprestimos_cur if False else None
# We'll compute debt as sum of current and non-current 'Empréstimos e Financiamentos'
Emp_cur = 67824000.0
Emp_ncur = 1788205000.0
DivBruta = Emp_cur + Emp_ncur

# Disponibilidades per developer (cash and equivalents)
Disponibilidades = Caixa
DivLiquida = DivBruta - Disponibilidades

# Shares
total_shares = 293452126
treasury = 352936
outstanding = total_shares - treasury
price = 13.13
market_cap = outstanding * price

# Enterprise Value
EV = market_cap + DivLiquida

# Per share metrics
lpa = net_ttm / outstanding
vpa = Patrimonio_Liq / outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / outstanding
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / outstanding
ativos_per_share = Ativo / outstanding
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante
ativ_circ_liq = Ativo_Circulante - Estoques  # assumption

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else float('inf')
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else float('inf')
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativ_circ_liq if ativ_circ_liq!=0 else float('inf')

ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else float('inf')

# Margins (percentage)
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0

# EBIT / Ativo (%)
eb_at = ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100 if Ativo!=0 else 0

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = ebit_ttm / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa) * 100

# ROE (%)
roe = net_ttm / Patrimonio_Liq * 100

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante (assumption)
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = DivBruta / Patrimonio_Liq

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo

# Prepare output mapping
results = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': DivBruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': DivLiquida,
    'Patrim. Líq': Patrimonio_Liq,
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rev_q125,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q125,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q125,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': eb_at,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print neatly
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

{"inp":{"code":"# Corrected calculations without nulls
from math import isfinite
# Given values (latest = 2025-03-31)
Ativo = 7454930000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 1573777000.0
Caixa = 315621000.0
Aplicacoes = 702215000.0
ContasReceber = 355003000.0
Estoques = 19734000.0
TributosRec = 100087000.0
OutrosAC = 81117000.0
Ativo_Nao_Circulante = 5881153000.0
Imobilizado = 5573251000.0
Intangivel = 76148000.0

Passivo_Circulante = 636063000.0
Fornecedores = 367947000.0
Emprestimos_cur = 67824000.0
OutrasObr = 32652000.0
Provisoes_cur = 171000.0

Passivo_Nao_Circulante = 2355077000.0
Emprestimos_ncur = 1788205000.0
OutrasObr_ncur = 375425000.0
Provisoes_ncur = 191447000.0

Patrimonio_Liq = 4463790000.0

# Income statement: quarterly (Q1 2025) and Q1 2024 and annual 2024
# Q1 2025 (ÚLTIMO 2025-01-01 to 2025-03-31)
rev_q125 = 860752000.0
cogs_q125 = -540866000.0
gross_q125 = 319886000.0
oper_q125 = -60121000.0
ebit_q125 = 259765000.0
fin_q125 = 48997000.0
pre_tax_q125 = 308762000.0
tax_q125 = -81233000.0
net_q125 = 227529000.0

# Q1 2024 (PENULTIMO quarter provided)
rev_q124 = 744735000.0
cogs_q124 = -475848000.0
gross_q124 = 268887000.0
oper_q124 = -69397000.0
ebit_q124 = 199490000.0
fin_q124 = -70978000.0
pre_tax_q124 = 128512000.0
tax_q124 = -18479000.0
net_q124 = 110033000.0

# Annual 2024 (ÚLTIMO in previous annual table)
rev_2024 = 3264554000.0
ebit_2024 = 948220000.0
net_2024 = 437498000.0
gross_2024 = 1191749000.0
dep_2024 = -694816000.0
# Depreciation Q1 values (negative in table)
dep_q125 = -164082000.0
dep_q124 = -153862000.0

# Trailing twelve months (TTM) ending 2025-03-31 = annual2024 + Q1_2025 - Q1_2024
rev_ttm = rev_2024 + rev_q125 - rev_q124
ebit_ttm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q125 - ebit_q124
net_ttm = net_2024 + net_q125 - net_q124
gross_ttm = gross_2024 + gross_q125 - gross_q124
# Depreciation TTM (absolute expense)
dep_ttm = dep_2024 + dep_q125 - dep_q124
# dep values negative (expenses) -> dep_ttm negative; take magnitude
dep_ttm_mag = -dep_ttm

# EBITDA TTM = EBIT_TTM + depreciation magnitude
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + dep_ttm_mag

# Debt
Emp_cur = 67824000.0
Emp_ncur = 1788205000.0
DivBruta = Emp_cur + Emp_ncur

# Disponibilidades per developer (cash and equivalents)
Disponibilidades = Caixa
DivLiquida = DivBruta - Disponibilidades

# Shares
total_shares = 293452126
treasury = 352936
outstanding = total_shares - treasury
price = 13.13
market_cap = outstanding * price

# Enterprise Value
EV = market_cap + DivLiquida

# Per share metrics
lpa = net_ttm / outstanding
vpa = Patrimonio_Liq / outstanding
ebit_per_share = ebit_ttm / outstanding
rev_per_share = rev_ttm / outstanding
ativos_per_share = Ativo / outstanding
cap_giro = Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante
ativ_circ_liq = Ativo_Circulante - Estoques  # assumption

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else float('inf')
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else float('inf')
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativos = market_cap / Ativo
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativ_circ_liq if ativ_circ_liq!=0 else float('inf')

ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else float('inf')

# Margins (percentage)
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0
marg_liq = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else 0

# EBIT / Ativo (%)
eb_at = ebit_ttm / Ativo * 100 if Ativo!=0 else 0

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = ebit_ttm / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa) * 100

# ROE (%)
roe = net_ttm / Patrimonio_Liq * 100

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante (assumption)
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = DivBruta / Patrimonio_Liq

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / Ativo

# Prepare output mapping
results = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': DivBruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': DivLiquida,
    'Patrim. Líq': Patrimonio_Liq,
    'Receita Líquida (12 meses)': rev_ttm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ttm,
    'Lucro Líquido (12 meses)': net_ttm,
    'Receita Líquida (3 meses)': rev_q125,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q125,
    'Lucro Líquido (3 meses)': net_q125,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': pvp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. Líquida': marg_liq,
    'EBIT / Ativo': eb_at,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Using previous computed values, format final JSON according to schema with rounding
import json
results = {
  "Ativo": round(7454930000.0, 2),
  "Disponibilidades": round(315621000.0, 2),
  "Ativo Circulante": round(1573777000.0, 2),
  "Dív. Bruta": round(1856029000.0, 2),
  "Dív. Líquida": round(1540408000.0, 2),
  "Patrim. Líq": round(4463790000.0, 2),
  "Receita Líquida (12 meses)": round(3380571000.0, 2),
  "EBIT (12 meses)": round(1008495000.0, 2),
  "Lucro Líquido (12 meses)": round(554994000.0, 2),
  "Receita Líquida (3 meses)": round(860752000.0, 2),
  "EBIT (3 meses)": round(259765000.0, 2),
  "Lucro Líquido (3 meses)": round(227529000.0, 2),
}
# ratios and per-share
outstanding = 293452126 - 352936
price = 13.13
market_cap = outstanding * price
lpa = 554994000.0 / outstanding
vpa = 4463790000.0 / outstanding
# Derived ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / 1008495000.0
psr = market_cap / 3380571000.0
p_ativos = market_cap / 7454930000.0
cap_giro = 1573777000.0 - 636063000.0
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro
ativ_circ_liq = 1573777000.0 - 19734000.0
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / ativ_circ_liq
Emp_cur = 67824000.0
Emp_ncur = 1788205000.0
DivBruta = Emp_cur + Emp_ncur
Disponibilidades = 315621000.0
DivLiquida = DivBruta - Disponibilidades
EV = market_cap + DivLiquida
# depreciation magnitude
dep_ttm_mag = 705036000.0
ebitda_ttm = 1008495000.0 + dep_ttm_mag
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_ttm
ev_ebit = EV / 1008495000.0
# margins
marg_bruta = 36.7614820099918
marg_ebit = 29.832090495954677
marg_liq = 16.41716739568552
# other ratios
eb_at = 13.52789362207291
roic = 14.893532497597972
roe = 12.433246187656676
liquidez_corr = 1573777000.0 / 636063000.0
divbr_patrim = DivBruta / 4463790000.0
giro_ativos = 3380571000.0 / 7454930000.0

# assemble final list per required indicators (enumeration order not required)
indicators = [
    {"indicator":"Ativo","value":results["Ativo"]},
    {"indicator":"Disponibilidades","value":results["Disponibilidades"]},
    {"indicator":"Ativo Circulante","value":results["Ativo Circulante"]},
    {"indicator":"Dív. Bruta","value":results["Dív. Bruta"]},
    {"indicator":"Dív. Líquida","value":results["Dív. Líquida"]},
    {"indicator":"Patrim. Líq","value":results["Patrim. Líq"]},
    {"indicator":"Receita L\u00edquida (12 meses)","value":results["Receita L\u00edquida (12 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"EBIT (12 meses)","value":results["EBIT (12 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"Lucro L\u00edquido (12 meses)","value":results["Lucro L\u00edquido (12 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"Receita L\u00edquida (3 meses)","value":results["Receita L\u00edquida (3 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"EBIT (3 meses)","value":results["EBIT (3 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"Lucro L\u00edquido (3 meses)","value":results["Lucro L\u00edquido (3 meses)"]},
    {"indicator":"P/L","value":round(pl,4)},
    {"indicator":"P/VP","value":round(pvp,4)},
    {"indicator":"P/EBIT","value":round(p_ebit,4)},
    {"indicator":"PSR","value":round(psr,4)},
    {"indicator":"P/Ativos","value":round(p_ativos,4)},
    {"indicator":"P/Cap. Giro","value":round(p_cap_giro,4)},
    {"indicator":"P/Ativ Circ Liq","value":round(p_ativ_circ_liq,4)},
    {"indicator":"EV / EBITDA","value":round(ev_ebitda,4)},
    {"indicator":"EV / EBIT","value":round(ev_ebit,4)},
    {"indicator":"LPA","value":round(lpa,6)},
    {"indicator":"VPA","value":round(vpa,6)},
    {"indicator":"Marg. Bruta","value":round(marg_bruta,2)},
    {"indicator":"Marg. EBIT","value":round(marg_ebit,2)},
    {"indicator":"Marg. Líquida","value":round(marg_liq,2)},
    {"indicator":"EBIT / Ativo","value":round(eb_at,2)},
    {"indicator":"ROIC","value":round(roic,2)},
    {"indicator":"ROE","value":round(roe,2)},
    {"indicator":"Liquidez Corr","value":round(liquidez_corr,4)},
    {"indicator":"Div Br/ Patrim","value":round(divbr_patrim,4)},
    {"indicator":"Giro Ativos","value":round(giro_ativos,4)}
]
print(json.dumps({"indicators":indicators}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
